_comment: Latest auto-bounty completed by the live VPS swarm. Updated by /opt/scholar-swarm/scripts/vps-cron-bounty.sh every 6 hours. Frontend reads this file via raw.githubusercontent.com to render the 'Last live run' badge.
deploymentNote: 5 AXL nodes + 5 agent runtimes managed by systemd, restart=always. SearXNG on the same host serves retrieval. Cron triggers a fresh bounty every 6 hours.
